service: This reference provides descriptions of the low-level AWS Artifact Service API.

operations.GetComplianceInquiryMetadata: Get the metadata for a single compliance inquiry.
operations.GetReport: Get the content for a single report.
operations.GetReportMetadata: Get the metadata for a single report.
operations.GetTermForReport: Get the Term content associated with a single report.
operations.ListCustomerAgreements: List active customer-agreements applicable to calling identity.
operations.ListReportVersions: List available report versions for a given report.

AccessDeniedException.base: User does not have sufficient access to perform this action.

refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$acceptanceTerms: Terms required to accept the agreement resource.
refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$terminateTerms: Terms required to terminate the customer-agreement resource.

refs.ExportComplianceInquiryRequest$includeCi: When true, include citations in the exported document.

ConflictException.base: Request to create/modify content would result in a conflict.

refs.GetReportResponse$documentPresignedUrl: Presigned S3 url to access the report content.

refs.GetTermForReportResponse$documentPresign: Presigned S3 url to access the term content.

InquiryContent.base: Content for creating a compliance inquiry - either a single query or file content.

refs.CreateComplianceInquiryRequest$inquiryCo: Content for creating a compliance inquiry - either a single query or file content.

InquiryFileContent.base: File content structure for compliance inquiry uploads.

refs.ExportComplianceInquiryRequest$complianc: Unique resource ID for the compliance inquiry.
refs.GetComplianceInquiryMetadataRequest$comp: Unique resource ID for the compliance inquiry.
refs.InquiryDetail$id: Unique resource ID for the compliance inquiry.
refs.InquirySummary$id: Unique resource ID for the compliance inquiry.
refs.ListComplianceInquiryQueriesRequest$comp: Unique resource ID for the compliance inquiry.

refs.CreateComplianceInquiryResponse$complian: Summary information about the created compliance inquiry.

refs.CreateComplianceInquiryRequest$supportMo: Support mode for inquiry processing. Only supported for file upload mode. Defaults to AI_ONLY if not specified.
refs.InquiryDetail$supportMode: Support mode for this inquiry. AI_ONLY provides AI-generated responses. FULL_SUPPORT includes human expert review.

refs.InternalServerException$retryAfterSecond: Number of seconds in which the caller can retry the request.
refs.QuerySummary$queryIdentifier: Sequential identifier of the query within the inquiry.
refs.ThrottlingException$retryAfterSeconds: Number of seconds in which the caller can retry the request.

refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$agreementArn: ARN of the agreement resource the customer-agreement resource represents.
refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$organizationArn: ARN of the organization that owns the resource.
refs.ListTagsForResourceRequest$resourceArn: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource.
refs.TagResourceRequest$resourceArn: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource.
refs.UntagResourceRequest$resourceArn: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource.

refs.ListComplianceInquiriesRequest$maxResult: Maximum number of resources to return in the paginated response.
refs.ListComplianceInquiryQueriesRequest$maxR: Maximum number of resources to return in the paginated response.
refs.ListCustomerAgreementsRequest$maxResults: Maximum number of resources to return in the paginated response.
refs.ListReportVersionsRequest$maxResults: Maximum number of resources to return in the paginated response.
refs.ListReportsRequest$maxResults: Maximum number of resources to return in the paginated response.

refs.ListComplianceInquiriesRequest$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListComplianceInquiriesResponse$nextToke: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListComplianceInquiryQueriesRequest$next: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListComplianceInquiryQueriesResponse$nex: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListCustomerAgreementsRequest$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListCustomerAgreementsResponse$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListReportVersionsRequest$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListReportVersionsResponse$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListReportsRequest$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.
refs.ListReportsResponse$nextToken: Pagination token to request the next page of resources.

refs.ExportComplianceInquiryResponse$document: Presigned S3 URL to access the exported compliance inquiry report.

refs.ExportComplianceInquiryRequest$queryIden: List of query identifiers to include in the export.

QuerySummary.base: Summary information about a single query within a compliance inquiry.

refs.GetReportMetadataRequest$reportId: Unique resource ID for the report resource.
refs.GetReportRequest$reportId: Unique resource ID for the report resource.
refs.GetTermForReportRequest$reportId: Unique resource ID for the report resource.
refs.ListReportVersionsRequest$reportId: Unique resource ID for the report resource.
refs.ReportDetail$id: Unique resource ID for the report resource.
refs.ReportSummary$id: Unique resource ID for the report resource.

ResourceNotFoundException.base: Request references a resource which does not exist.

ResponseVersion.base: A versioned snapshot of a response edit.

refs.QuerySummary$updatedResponseVersions: Ordered list of response version history entries, oldest first.

ServiceQuotaExceededException.base: Request would cause a service quota to be exceeded.

refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$awsAccountId: AWS account Id that owns the resource.
refs.GetReportRequest$termToken: Unique download token provided by GetTermForReport API.
refs.ReportDetail$companyName: Associated company name for the report resource.
refs.ReportDetail$productName: Associated product name for the report resource.
refs.ReportSummary$companyName: Associated company name for the report resource.
refs.ReportSummary$productName: Associated product name for the report resource.

refs.ReportDetail$statusMessage: The message associated with the current upload state.
refs.ReportSummary$statusMessage: The message associated with the current upload state.

refs.ValidationExceptionField$message: Message describing why the field failed validation.

refs.UntagResourceRequest$tagKeys: Tag keys to remove from the resource.

TagsMap.base: A map of tag keys to tag values.

refs.CreateComplianceInquiryRequest$tags: Tags to associate with the compliance inquiry resource.
refs.CreateComplianceInquiryResponse$tags: Tags associated with the compliance inquiry resource.
refs.ExportComplianceInquiryResponse$tags: Tags associated with the compliance inquiry resource.
refs.GetComplianceInquiryMetadataResponse$tag: Tags associated with the compliance inquiry resource.

ThrottlingException.base: Request was denied due to request throttling.

refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$effectiveStart: Timestamp indicating when the agreement became effective.
refs.CustomerAgreementSummary$effectiveEnd: Timestamp indicating when the agreement was terminated.
refs.InquiryDetail$createdAt: Timestamp indicating when the resource was created.
refs.InquiryDetail$updatedAt: Timestamp indicating when the resource was last modified.
refs.InquirySummary$createdAt: Timestamp indicating when the resource was created.
refs.ReportDetail$periodStart: Timestamp indicating the report resource effective start.
refs.ReportDetail$periodEnd: Timestamp indicating the report resource effective end.
refs.ReportDetail$createdAt: Timestamp indicating when the report resource was created.
refs.ReportDetail$lastModifiedAt: Timestamp indicating when the report resource was last modified.
refs.ReportDetail$deletedAt: Timestamp indicating when the report resource was deleted.
refs.ReportSummary$periodStart: Timestamp indicating the report resource effective start.
refs.ReportSummary$periodEnd: Timestamp indicating the report resource effective end.
refs.ResponseVersion$timestamp: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this edit was made.

refs.ReportDetail$uploadState: The current state of the document upload.
refs.ReportSummary$uploadState: The current state of the document upload.

ValidationException.base: Request fails to satisfy the constraints specified by an AWS service.

refs.ValidationException$fieldList: The field that caused the error, if applicable.
